2604.23861.title: Empirical Ablation and Ensemble Optimization of a Convolutional Neural Network for CIFAR-10 Classification
2604.23861.paper_summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) remain a central approach in image classification, but their performance depends strongly on architectural and training choices. This paper presents an empirical ablation-based study of CNN optimization for the CIFAR-10 benchmark. The study evaluates 17 progressive modifications involving training duration, learning-rate scheduling, dropout configuration, pooling strategy, network depth, filter arrangement, and dense-layer design. The goal is to identify which changes improve generalization and which increase complexity without improving performance. The baseline model achieved 79.5\% test accuracy. Extending training duration improved performance steadily, whereas several structural redesigns reduced accuracy despite greater architectural variation. Based on the strongest individual configurations, a weighted ensemble was constructed, achieving 86.38\% accuracy in the reduced-data setting and 89.23\% when trained using the full CIFAR-10 dataset. These results suggest that performance gains in CNN-based classification depend less on indiscriminate increases in depth or parameter count than on careful empirical selection of training and architectural modifications. The study therefore highlights the practical value of ablation-oriented optimization and ensemble learning for small-image classification.
2604.23861.paper_summary_zh: 卷積神經網絡 (CNN) 仍然是圖像分類中的核心方法，但其性能在很大程度上取決於架構和訓練選擇。本文提出了一項基於實證的 CNN 優化消融研究，針對 CIFAR-10 基準進行分析。該研究評估了 17 種漸進式修改，涉及訓練時長、學習率調度、隨機失活配置、池化策略、網絡深度、濾波器排列和密集層設計。目標是確定哪些變更能改善泛化能力，哪些則在不提高性能的情況下增加了複雜性。基準模型達到了 79.5\% 的測試準確率。延長訓練時長穩步提高了性能，而幾種結構重設則在更大的架構變化下降低了準確率。基於最強的單一配置，構建了一個加權集成，在減少數據的設置中達到了 86.38\% 的準確率，而在使用完整 CIFAR-10 數據集訓練時則達到了 89.23\% 的準確率。這些結果表明，基於 CNN 的分類性能提升與其深度或參數數量的隨意增加關係不大，而與對訓練和架構修改的謹慎實證選擇更為相關。因此，該研究突顯了以消融為導向的優化和集成學習在小圖像分類中的實際價值。
2604.23861.author: Naser Khatti Dizabadi et.al.
